verified_examples.name: PCOpen Iterate
verified_examples.code: int pc = pcopen(0, 'P', @P, 1.0, 10); while(pciterate(pc)) { vector p; pcimport(pc, 'P', p); } pcclose(pc);
verified_examples.explanation: In this VEX example (PCOpen Iterate), the code opens a point cloud to query nearby points and uses a loop to iterate over elements.
